name: Amethyst
description: Automatic tiling window manager for macOS inspired by xmonad — keyboard-driven, multiple layouts.

seo.title: Amethyst — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Amethyst: Automatic tiling window manager for macOS inspired by xmonad — keyboard-driven, multiple layouts.

when_to_use: Tiling layout for multi-window coding on macOS
Keyboard-driven window management without mouse usage
Auto-arranging browser + terminal + editor side by side
Custom space layouts for design vs. development work
Productivity boost for developers on large monitors

pros: Multiple tiling layouts out of the box
cons: Limited config vs yabai or Hyprland
review.verdict: Solid no-frills tiling for macOS if you want xmonad vibes without compiling yabai.
review.best_for: macOS users coming from xmonad or i3 wanting simple keyboard-driven tiling
review.not_for: Users who want polished animations or deep scripting control

transparency.reason: Free OSS macOS window manager, MIT

developer_experience.reason: macOS-specific; extensible via config, minimal API
